requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Performance Rating — NM IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与性能额定——NM IEC 60034-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與性能額定——NM IEC 60034-1

summary.en: Industrial AC motors placed on the Moroccan market must conform to NM IEC 60034-1 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-1), covering rating, performance classes, insulation, temperature rise, and operational safety. NM IEC 60034-5 covers IP degrees of protection and NM IEC 60034-6 covers cooling methods. These NM standards mirror the IEC 60034 series directly. Conformity may be demonstrated through IMANOR assessment or, via Morocco-EU Advanced Status, through a CE DoC referencing IEC/EN 60034-1 (Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU compliance). Motors must be rated for the Moroccan grid: 400 V, 50 Hz. Neither CCC nor Chinese GB test reports alone constitute a recognised conformity demonstration for Morocco.
summary.zh: 投放摩洛哥市场的工业交流电动机须符合NM IEC 60034-1（IMANOR对IEC 60034-1的采纳标准），涵盖额定值、性能等级、绝缘、温升和运行安全。NM IEC 60034-5涵盖IP防护等级，NM IEC 60034-6涵盖冷却方式。这些NM标准直接对应IEC 60034系列。合规可通过IMANOR评估证明，或借助摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位，通过引用IEC/EN 60034-1（低压指令2014/35/EU合规性）的CE符合性声明证明。电动机须按摩洛哥电网额定：400 V、50 Hz。CCC及中国GB测试报告单独均不构成被摩洛哥认可的合规证明。
summary.zht: 投放摩洛哥市場的工業交流電動機須符合NM IEC 60034-1（IMANOR對IEC 60034-1的採納標準），涵蓋額定值、性能等級、絕緣、溫升和運行安全。NM IEC 60034-5涵蓋IP防護等級，NM IEC 60034-6涵蓋冷卻方式。這些NM標準直接對應IEC 60034系列。合規可通過IMANOR評估證明，或借助摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位，通過引用IEC/EN 60034-1（低壓指令2014/35/EU合規性）的CE符合性聲明證明。電動機須按摩洛哥電網額定：400 V、50 Hz。CCC及中國GB測試報告單獨均不構成被摩洛哥認可的合規證明。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-1 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-1 — ratings and performance)
NM IEC 60034-5 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-5 — IP degrees of protection)
NM IEC 60034-6 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-6 — cooling methods)

summary.en: In China, industrial motors are governed by GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) for ratings and performance, and GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) for IP protection. The technical content of GB 755 is largely equivalent to IEC/EN 60034-1, so motors tested to GB 755 are typically close to IEC 60034-1 benchmarks. However, GB test reports and GB 755 certificates are not directly accepted for IMANOR conformity or CE DoC use without equivalence justification. Additionally, Chinese motors are rated 380 V, 50 Hz — not 400 V, 50 Hz as required for Morocco.
summary.zh: 在中国，工业电动机的额定及性能受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范，IP防护受GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）规范。GB 755的技术内容与IEC/EN 60034-1大体相当，因此按GB 755测试的电动机通常接近IEC 60034-1基准。但GB测试报告和GB 755证书未经等效性论证，不能直接用于IMANOR合规评估或CE符合性声明。此外，中国电动机额定380 V、50 Hz——与摩洛哥要求的400 V、50 Hz不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，工業電動機的額定及性能受GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範，IP防護受GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）規範。GB 755的技術內容與IEC/EN 60034-1大體相當，因此按GB 755測試的電動機通常接近IEC 60034-1基準。但GB測試報告和GB 755證書未經等效性論證，不能直接用於IMANOR合規評估或CE符合性聲明。此外，中國電動機額定380 V、50 Hz——與摩洛哥要求的400 V、50 Hz不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1 — CN domestic standard)
GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5 — IP protection, CN domestic)

gap.en: Chinese GB 755 technical content is largely equivalent to IEC/EN 60034-1 and NM IEC 60034-1, so the technical safety performance gap is typically small. The critical gaps are: (1) conformity route — GB test reports and CCC are not accepted; IMANOR assessment or CE DoC under LVD is required; (2) voltage rating — motors must be rated 400 V, 50 Hz for Morocco, not 380 V; (3) language — documentation for Moroccan market should be in French or Arabic. These procedural, documentary, and rating gaps must be resolved before export.
gap.zh: 中国GB 755的技术内容与IEC/EN 60034-1及NM IEC 60034-1大体相当，因此技术安全性能差距通常较小。关键差距在于：(1) 合规路径——GB测试报告和CCC不被接受；须提供IMANOR评估或LVD下的CE符合性声明；(2) 电压额定值——电动机须额定400 V、50 Hz（摩洛哥要求），而非380 V；(3) 语言——摩洛哥市场文件须为法语或阿拉伯语。这些程序、文件和额定值差距须在出口前解决。
gap.zht: 中國GB 755的技術內容與IEC/EN 60034-1及NM IEC 60034-1大體相當，因此技術安全性能差距通常較小。關鍵差距在於：(1) 合規路徑——GB測試報告和CCC不被接受；須提供IMANOR評估或LVD下的CE符合性聲明；(2) 電壓額定值——電動機須額定400 V、50 Hz（摩洛哥要求），而非380 V；(3) 語言——摩洛哥市場文件須為法語或阿拉伯語。這些程序、文件和額定值差距須在出口前解決。

mandatory_status.target: NM IEC 60034-1 conformity required; IMANOR assessment or CE DoC (LVD) accepted; 400 V, 50 Hz rating mandatory for Morocco grid
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN sale — GB 755-2019 compliance required; 380 V, 50 Hz rating; CCC not required for most general industrial motors

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors built to GB 755-2019 are technically close to NM IEC 60034-1 benchmarks, but Morocco market entry requires IMANOR conformity assessment or CE DoC under LVD 2014/35/EU, plus 400 V, 50 Hz nameplate rating and French or Arabic documentation. GB test reports and CCC are not a recognised route. These procedural and rating obligations must be completed before shipment to Morocco. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB 755-2019制造的中国电动机在技术上接近NM IEC 60034-1基准，但进入摩洛哥市场须提供IMANOR合规评估或LVD 2014/35/EU下的CE符合性声明，同时铭牌须标注400 V、50 Hz额定值并提供法语或阿拉伯语文件。GB测试报告和CCC不是被认可的路径。这些程序和额定值义务须在向摩洛哥出货前完成。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB 755-2019製造的中國電動機在技術上接近NM IEC 60034-1基準，但進入摩洛哥市場須提供IMANOR合規評估或LVD 2014/35/EU下的CE符合性聲明，同時銘牌須標注400 V、50 Hz額定值並提供法語或阿拉伯語文件。GB測試報告和CCC不是被認可的路徑。這些程序和額定值義務須在向摩洛哥出貨前完成。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: IP Protection Class and Cooling — NM IEC 60034-5 and NM IEC 60034-6
requirement_topic.zh: IP防护等级与冷却——NM IEC 60034-5与NM IEC 60034-6
requirement_topic.zht: IP防護等級與冷卻——NM IEC 60034-5與NM IEC 60034-6

summary.en: Morocco adopts NM IEC 60034-5 (equivalent to IEC 60034-5) for IP degrees of protection of rotating electrical machines, and NM IEC 60034-6 for cooling methods (IC codes). Motors sold in Morocco must carry an IP and IC designation on the nameplate in accordance with these NM standards. Where CE DoC is the accepted conformity route, IP and cooling class conformity evidence prepared to IEC 60034-5 / EN 60034-5 and IEC 60034-6 / EN 60034-6 is appropriate and consistent with NM requirements. Morocco's climate (Mediterranean and semi-arid zones) may require buyers to specify higher IP ratings for installations in dusty or outdoor environments.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥采纳NM IEC 60034-5（等同IEC 60034-5）作为旋转电机IP防护等级标准，NM IEC 60034-6作为冷却方式（IC代码）标准。在摩洛哥销售的电动机须在铭牌上按这些NM标准标注IP和IC代码。当CE符合性声明为被接受的合规路径时，依据IEC 60034-5 / EN 60034-5和IEC 60034-6 / EN 60034-6准备的IP和冷却等级合规证据是适当的，与NM要求一致。摩洛哥气候（地中海及半干旱地区）可能要求买家在多尘或户外安装环境中指定更高的IP等级。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥採納NM IEC 60034-5（等同IEC 60034-5）作為旋轉電機IP防護等級標準，NM IEC 60034-6作為冷卻方式（IC代碼）標準。在摩洛哥銷售的電動機須在銘牌上按這些NM標準標注IP和IC代碼。當CE符合性聲明為被接受的合規路徑時，依據IEC 60034-5 / EN 60034-5和IEC 60034-6 / EN 60034-6準備的IP和冷卻等級合規證據是適當的，與NM要求一致。摩洛哥氣候（地中海及半乾旱地區）可能要求買家在多塵或戶外安裝環境中指定更高的IP等級。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-5 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-5 — IP degrees of protection for rotating machines)
NM IEC 60034-6 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-6 — cooling methods IC code)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5) for IP protection classification and GB/T 1993-2019 (aligned with IEC 60034-6) for cooling methods. These Chinese standards are technically aligned with the IEC 60034-5 and IEC 60034-6 bases that Morocco's NM standards mirror. IP and IC designation markings on Chinese motors per GB/T 4942 and GB/T 1993 are technically consistent with IEC 60034-5 / IEC 60034-6 designations, so the technical content gap is typically small for IP and cooling classes.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 4942-2021（与IEC 60034-5对应）进行IP防护等级分类，GB/T 1993-2019（与IEC 60034-6对应）规定冷却方式。这些中国标准在技术上与摩洛哥NM标准所参照的IEC 60034-5和IEC 60034-6基础一致。中国电动机按GB/T 4942和GB/T 1993标注的IP和IC代码，在技术内容上与IEC 60034-5 / IEC 60034-6标注一致，因此IP和冷却等级的技术内容差距通常较小。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 4942-2021（與IEC 60034-5對應）進行IP防護等級分類，GB/T 1993-2019（與IEC 60034-6對應）規定冷卻方式。這些中國標準在技術上與摩洛哥NM標準所參照的IEC 60034-5和IEC 60034-6基礎一致。中國電動機按GB/T 4942和GB/T 1993標注的IP和IC代碼，在技術內容上與IEC 60034-5 / IEC 60034-6標注一致，因此IP和冷卻等級的技術內容差距通常較小。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 4942-2021 (aligned with IEC 60034-5 — IP protection for rotating machines)
GB/T 1993-2019 (aligned with IEC 60034-6 — cooling methods IC code)

gap.en: The technical gap for IP and cooling class is typically small because Chinese GB/T 4942 and GB/T 1993 are aligned with IEC 60034-5 and IEC 60034-6, which Morocco mirrors via NM adoption. The residual gap is documentary: IP and IC designations must appear on the nameplate and be documented in the conformity evidence package. The conformity route gap remains — GB/T test reports alone are not a recognised path for Morocco; IMANOR assessment or CE DoC is required. Buyers in Morocco may additionally specify higher IP ratings for local climate considerations.
gap.zh: IP和冷却等级的技术差距通常较小，因为中国GB/T 4942和GB/T 1993与IEC 60034-5和IEC 60034-6对应，而摩洛哥通过NM采纳标准与之对应。残余差距在于文件层面：铭牌须标注IP和IC代码，并在合规证据包中记录。合规路径差距仍然存在——仅凭GB/T测试报告不是摩洛哥认可的路径；须提供IMANOR评估或CE符合性声明。摩洛哥买家可能还会因当地气候因素要求更高的IP等级。
gap.zht: IP和冷卻等級的技術差距通常較小，因為中國GB/T 4942和GB/T 1993與IEC 60034-5和IEC 60034-6對應，而摩洛哥通過NM採納標準與之對應。殘余差距在於文件層面：銘牌須標注IP和IC代碼，並在合規證據包中記錄。合規路徑差距仍然存在——僅憑GB/T測試報告不是摩洛哥認可的路徑；須提供IMANOR評估或CE符合性聲明。摩洛哥買家可能還會因當地氣候因素要求更高的IP等級。

mandatory_status.target: NM IEC 60034-5 IP class and NM IEC 60034-6 IC code marking required on nameplate; IMANOR assessment or CE DoC (referencing IEC/EN 60034-5 and 60034-6) is the accepted conformity route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN sale — GB/T 4942 and GB/T 1993 labelling required; technically aligned with IEC 60034-5 and IEC 60034-6; GB/T reports alone not a recognised route for Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with IP and IC designations per GB/T 4942 / GB/T 1993 are technically close to NM IEC 60034-5 / NM IEC 60034-6 requirements, as both align to the same IEC base. However, conformity evidence must be presented via IMANOR assessment or CE DoC (referencing IEC/EN 60034-5 and 60034-6) — GB/T test reports alone are not sufficient for Morocco. Buyers should also specify IP class appropriate for Moroccan installation environment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GB/T 4942 / GB/T 1993标注IP和IC代码的中国电动机，在技术上接近NM IEC 60034-5 / NM IEC 60034-6要求，因为两者均与同一IEC基础对应。但合规证据须通过IMANOR评估或CE符合性声明（引用IEC/EN 60034-5和60034-6）提交——仅凭GB/T测试报告不足以用于摩洛哥。买家还应根据摩洛哥安装环境指定适当的IP等级。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GB/T 4942 / GB/T 1993標注IP和IC代碼的中國電動機，在技術上接近NM IEC 60034-5 / NM IEC 60034-6要求，因為兩者均與同一IEC基礎對應。但合規證據須通過IMANOR評估或CE符合性聲明（引用IEC/EN 60034-5和60034-6）提交——僅憑GB/T測試報告不足以用於摩洛哥。買家還應根據摩洛哥安裝環境指定適當的IP等級。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
